title: Iran condemns US seizure of Touska as 'armed piracy and theft'
snippet: Iran's foreign ministry condemned the seizure of the Touska as 'armed piracy and theft' and threatened retaliation. IRGC warned of a 'decisive response' to the US Navy action in the Gulf of Oman.
tag_reason: Iran's official response to ship seizure — threats of retaliation are new escalatory development
